metadata.name: agc_solana
metadata.description: Solana implementation of Agent Credit Protocol core policy and vault mechanics

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: The signer is not authorized for this instruction.

errors.name: InvalidMintAuthority
errors.msg: The configured SPL token mint authority is not the AGC program PDA.

errors.name: InvalidFreezeAuthority
errors.msg: The AGC-controlled mint must not have an external freeze authority.

errors.name: InvalidTokenAccount
errors.msg: The provided token account does not match the protocol configuration.

errors.name: UnsupportedDecimalConfig
errors.msg: The mint decimals are unsupported.

errors.name: InvalidMintDistribution
errors.msg: The mint distribution must total 10_000 bps and include xAGC.

errors.name: InvalidFee
errors.msg: The fee must be below 10_000 bps.

errors.name: InvalidPolicyParams
errors.msg: The policy parameters are internally inconsistent.

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: The amount must be non-zero.

errors.name: InsufficientShares
errors.msg: The xAGC token account does not have enough shares.

errors.name: InvalidPrice
errors.msg: The market price must be non-zero.

errors.name: EpochTooSoon
errors.msg: The epoch cannot be settled yet.

errors.name: InvalidEpoch
errors.msg: The epoch id has already been settled.

errors.name: InvalidSettlementRecipient
errors.msg: A settlement recipient account does not match protocol state.

errors.name: NoPendingTreasuryBuyback
errors.msg: There is no queued treasury buyback budget.

errors.name: BuybackEscrowNotConfigured
errors.msg: The protocol buyback escrow has not been configured.

errors.name: InvalidBuybackEscrow
errors.msg: The provided buyback escrow is not the configured escrow.

errors.name: Paused
errors.msg: The protocol is paused for this instruction.

errors.name: InvalidAdmin
errors.msg: The requested admin is invalid.

errors.name: InvalidGovernanceAuthority
errors.msg: The requested governance authority is invalid.

errors.name: InvalidCollateralAssetConfig
errors.msg: The collateral asset configuration is invalid.

errors.name: InvalidOracleSource
errors.msg: The collateral oracle source is invalid for this instruction.

errors.name: InvalidOraclePrice
errors.msg: The cached oracle price is invalid or stale.

errors.name: CollateralDisabled
errors.msg: The collateral asset is disabled.

errors.name: InvalidCreditFacilityConfig
errors.msg: The credit facility configuration is invalid.

errors.name: InvalidCreditLineConfig
errors.msg: The credit line configuration is invalid.

errors.name: CreditFacilityInactive
errors.msg: The credit facility is not active.

errors.name: CreditLineInactive
errors.msg: The credit line is not active.

errors.name: CreditLimitExceeded
errors.msg: The requested draw exceeds the credit line limit.

errors.name: InsufficientCollateral
errors.msg: The credit line does not have enough collateral.

errors.name: InsufficientCreditHealth
errors.msg: The credit line would be undercollateralized.

errors.name: InsufficientUnderwriterReserve
errors.msg: The underwriter vault would fall below required reserves.

errors.name: CreditLineMatured
errors.msg: The credit line has already matured.

errors.name: NoOutstandingDebt
errors.msg: The credit line has no outstanding debt.

errors.name: CreditLineHealthy
errors.msg: The credit line is still healthy.

errors.name: CreditLineNotDefaulted
errors.msg: The credit line is not defaulted.

errors.name: DeprecatedBuybackPath
errors.msg: The legacy buyback transfer path is disabled; use buyback campaigns.

errors.name: InvalidBuybackCampaignConfig
errors.msg: The buyback campaign configuration is invalid.

errors.name: BuybackCampaignInactive
errors.msg: The buyback campaign is not active.

errors.name: BuybackCampaignNotReady
errors.msg: The buyback campaign or slice is not ready.

errors.name: BuybackSliceTooLarge
errors.msg: The buyback slice exceeds campaign limits.

errors.name: BuybackDeadlineExpired
errors.msg: The buyback slice deadline has expired.

errors.name: InsufficientBuybackOutput
errors.msg: The buyback slice did not deliver enough AGC to burn.

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow or underflow.

errors.name: AmountTooLarge
errors.msg: A u128 policy amount does not fit into a u64 SPL token amount.

errors.name: InvalidClock
errors.msg: Clock returned a negative timestamp.
